rationale: Keep: the cited paper directly studies supplier vs. distributor dependence, interdependence magnitude/asymmetry, and argues the two sides’ dependence should be modeled separately—an explicit thematic match to the citing paper’s claimed contribution of separating supplier and buyer relative dependence and examining interdependence structure effects. Given this close construct-level overlap (and a confirmed DOI reference match), this is plausibly foundational/method-relevant rather than an incidental mention.
